findings.summary: Allwinner S3-based camera board top-level sheet. U.FL connector classified as IC, Ethernet nets misidentified as UART, WiFi module as regulator.

correct.description: U1 Allwinner S3 SoC correctly identified as main IC
U3 SY8089 buck converter correctly identified as regulator

incorrect.description: AE1 U.FL antenna connector classified as IC instead of connector
EPHY_TX/RX Ethernet PHY nets misidentified as UART interface
AP6236 WiFi/BT module classified as voltage regulator

suggestions: Recognize U.FL and similar antenna connector footprints as connectors, not ICs
Distinguish EPHY_ prefixed nets as Ethernet, not UART
Do not classify WiFi/BT combo modules (AP6236, ESP32, etc.) as regulators
Improve PMIC output voltage estimation for multi-output PMICs like AXP209

findings.summary: OtterCam-s3 power sub-sheet with AXP209 PMIC and SY8089 buck. AXP209 vout wrong, USB ESD marking inconsistent, VINT misclassified.

correct.description: SY8089 buck converter correctly identified with proper output voltage
TVS D4 correctly identified for USB protection
USB-C CC pulldown resistors correctly identified
Q1 LED driver transistor correctly identified

incorrect.description: AXP209 PMIC estimated_vout 4.8V is wrong for a multi-rail PMIC
USB differential pair has_esd flag inconsistent across detections
VINT net classified as interrupt signal but is actually a voltage reference rail

suggestions: For multi-output PMICs, list per-rail outputs instead of a single estimated_vout
Ensure has_esd is consistent for the same USB pair across all detection passes
Do not assume nets named VINT are interrupts; check context (power pin vs signal pin)

findings.summary: OtterCam-s3 ESP32-S3 camera board main sheet. Correct: Allwinner S3, SY8089 buck, SDIO buses, MIPI pairs, crystals, TVS. Incorrect: AE1 U.FL connector as IC, EPHY nets as UART, AP6236 WiFi as regulator, AXP209 vout 4.8V wrong. Missed: Ethernet PHY interface, I2C SCL line, DDR memory interface.

correct.description: U1 AllWinner-S3 correctly identified with 234 pins
U3 SY8089 correctly detected as switching regulator

incorrect.description: AE1 U.FL antenna connector classified as IC (should be connector)
EPHY_TX/RX Ethernet PHY nets misidentified as UART
AP6236 WiFi module classified as power regulator

suggestions: Recognize U.FL/coaxial connectors by Connector_Coaxial footprint
Add EPHY prefix to Ethernet detection, exclude from UART
Do not classify WiFi/BT modules as regulators

findings.summary: OtterCam-s3 Power sub-sheet (70 components). Correct: SY8089 buck, TVS D4, USB-C CC pulldowns, Q1 LED driver, RC reset filter. Incorrect: AXP209 vout 4.8V wrong, USB diff pair has_esd inconsistent, VINT classified as interrupt (is voltage ref), USB_DRV classified as high_speed. Missed: Multiple AXP209 output rails not enumerated.

correct.description: U3 SY8089 correctly detected with feedback divider R29/R30
D4 P6SMB6.8CA TVS correctly detected on +5V

incorrect.description: USB differential pair has_esd inconsistent with protection_devices

missed.description: AXP209 multiple output rails not enumerated (only +3V3 reported)

suggestions: For multi-output PMICs, detect all output rails
Do not classify VINT as interrupt
